info.title: wellnizz API
info.description: wellnizz API and MCP-compatible service for genetics, biomarkers, wearables, lab discovery, dashboard specs, action plans, and hosted billing.
info.x-guidance: Use /openapi.json to discover the API. For a payable operation, make the exact request without credentials, select a compatible option from PAYMENT-REQUIRED, then retry unchanged with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE. x402 payments create a payer-scoped private workspace; do not send user_id or organization_id. Use GET /.well-known/x402.json for the live route and price catalog.

get.description: Liveness probe. Returns 200 whenever the process is running; does not check dependencies.
Readiness probe. Returns 200 only when durable storage, authentication, email delivery configuration, and database migrations are healthy. Used by load balancers and orchestrators.

get.summary: Administrative dependency and storage readiness diagnostics

get.description: Service version and build metadata.
Machine-readable catalog of every endpoint with its method, path, required scopes, and MCP tool name.
Agent discovery manifest: base URL, auth requirements, available endpoints, and MCP tool list, so an autonomous agent can self-configure.
Machine-readable x402 v2 networks, facilitators, route templates, prices, and payer-scoped identity behavior.
This OpenAPI 3.1 specification, generated from the same schema source the service validates requests against.
List supported wellness data modalities, providers, setup requirements, and normalized outputs.
List public pricing tiers, rate limits, quotas, and caching behavior.

get.summary: Read hosted billing status for the authenticated workspace
get.description: Read the authenticated workspace’s hosted billing status and current subscription tier.

activation_source.description: The source of the billing decision. Hosted Checkout is normally shown once the introductory request allowance is exhausted.

post.description: Create a Stripe-hosted Checkout session after the introductory hosted request allowance, with a required payment method for a Standard, Builder, or Growth subscription.
Create a Stripe Billing Portal session for the authenticated workspace.

get.summary: List design systems for health UIs
get.description: List curated design-token sets for health & wellness UIs, inspired by well-known apps. Public reference data - no auth required.

get.summary: Get a design system with tokens + DESIGN.md
get.description: Get a design system's full tokens (color, typography, spacing, radii, elevation, motion, components) plus a ready-to-paste DESIGN.md. Public reference data.

get.summary: Get the complete public design-system handoff and implementation bindings for an agent-built app
get.description: Get a full public design-system handoff: component source, declarations, prompts, tokens, templates, UI kits, manifest, and binary asset URLs. Meridian also includes its existing production dashboard package and bindings.

email.description: Email address of the person authorizing access.

post.description: Send an 8-digit email sign-in code so a person can authorize an agent without a password.

email.description: Email address the code was sent to.

token.description: The 8-digit code from the sign-in email.

post.description: Verify an emailed one-time code and return an access token scoped to that user.

post.summary: Start explicit browser approval for a named agent

get.summary: Read the safe display details for an agent approval request
Poll agent approval with the private X-Agent-Login-Secret header

post.summary: Approve or deny a pending agent authorization

post.description: Create a short-lived, synthetic-only sandbox session and return a complete multimodal demo result without persisting data.
Re-run the deterministic, non-persistent synthetic demo using a sandbox session token.

tier.description: free is self-serve for personal use. Paid tiers require an admin token.

intended_use.description: personal_agent keys act for one person. mobile_sync creates a non-expiring, upload-only device credential for Wellnizz Connect. Products serving other users need app_platform_service on the builder tier or higher.

scopes.description: Defaults to the standard personal grant set when omitted.

enabled_endpoints.description: Defaults to the standard personal endpoint grants when omitted.

post.description: Issue a scoped bearer API key for an authenticated user or organization.

schema.description: Small imports only. NEVER use for VCF/VCF.GZ or large SNP/23andMe files; use start_genetics_upload instead.

post.description: Upload small biomarker, wearable, behavioral, or genetic text data. NEVER use this endpoint for VCF/VCF.GZ or large SNP/23andMe files; use POST /genetics/uploads and its signed PUT URL because this endpoint traverses Cloudflare and has a request-body limit.

post.summary: Start a resumable direct-to-storage genetics upload
post.description: Create a private direct-upload session for VCF, SNP-array, or 23andMe-style raw genetics data. The file body bypasses the API server and CDN.
Verify the directly uploaded genetic file, mark the genetics source complete, and make it eligible for queued analysis.

get.summary: List uploaded sources for a user

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User whose sources to list (defaults to the token subject).

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by category: biomarkers, wearables, genetics, behavioral.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: ISO timestamp lower bound on received_at.

get.description: List uploaded source documents for the authenticated user with optional category, since, and limit filters.

get.summary: Read a source and its normalized observations
get.description: Read a single uploaded source with its normalized observations.
Read completion events for imports, analyses, wearable syncs, exports, and deletion receipts.

post.description: Start a generic wearables connection flow for a supported source provider.
Complete a generic wearables OAuth callback and register the connected account.
Build an OAuth authorization URL for WHOOP or Oura. (Google Health Connect connects via the mobile bridge through /connections/wearables/start.)
Exchange a provider OAuth code for provider tokens.
Exchange a provider refresh token for a fresh access token (WHOOP) so long-running syncs do not expire.

post.summary: Push Google Health Connect readings from the wellnizz mobile SDK
post.description: Push user-authorized Google Health Connect readings through the stable wellnizz mobile SDK envelope.

get.summary: Read queued wearable sync job status
get.description: Read queued wearable sync job status.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User whose analyses to list (defaults to the token subject).

parameters.name: modality
parameters.description: Filter by modality: biomarkers, wearables, genetics, multimodal.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: ISO timestamp lower bound on created_at.

get.description: List stored analyses for the authenticated user with optional modality, since, and limit filters.

annotation_depth.description: Genetics only. compact uses the bundled ClinVar-derived reference; full_dbsnp requires the provisioned paid hosted capability or explicit self-hosted setup.

post.description: Run a health analysis from uploaded source IDs.

get.description: Read a stored analysis result for the authenticated user.

get.summary: Read prioritized recommendations for an analysis
get.description: Read prioritized, de-duplicated action items derived from a stored analysis.

get.summary: Build a customized action plan (interventions + evidence-graded supplement stack) for an analysis
get.description: Build a customized action plan (lifestyle interventions + an evidence-graded supplement stack) mapped from a stored analysis, cross-referenced against the user's logged supplements and medications.

post.summary: Re-run a stored analysis on its existing sources
post.description: Re-run a stored analysis against its existing sources, producing a fresh analysis result and dashboard spec.

annotation_depth.description: Genetics only. compact uses the bundled ClinVar-derived reference; full_dbsnp requires the provisioned paid hosted capability or explicit self-hosted setup.

post.description: Calculate supported derived biomarkers from existing uploaded lab sources.

annotation_depth.description: Genetics only. compact uses the bundled ClinVar-derived reference; full_dbsnp requires the provisioned paid hosted capability or explicit self-hosted setup.

post.description: Interpret direct and derived biomarker results from existing uploaded lab sources.

annotation_depth.description: Genetics only. compact uses the bundled ClinVar-derived reference; full_dbsnp requires the provisioned paid hosted capability or explicit self-hosted setup.

post.description: Analyze sleep, recovery, activity, and cardiovascular observations from wearable sources.

annotation_depth.description: Genetics only. compact uses the bundled ClinVar-derived reference; full_dbsnp requires the provisioned paid hosted capability or explicit self-hosted setup.

post.description: Start a genetics-only analysis for uploaded VCF, WGS, or SNP-array sources.
Prepare ancestry analysis for an uploaded genetic source and return reference-panel setup requirements or ancestry proportions when the ancestry worker is configured.

get.summary: Read queued genetic analysis job status
get.description: Read queued WGS/SNP-array analysis status, progress stage, retry state, and reanalysis recommendation.
Read a dashboard-ready JSON spec for an analysis.

post.summary: Create an expiring private dashboard URL

503.description: Private dashboard links are not configured

analysis_id.description: Analysis whose dashboard snapshot will be rendered.

post.description: Create an expiring, private-by-possession hosted dashboard URL for an analysis and selected design system.

200.description: The rendered dashboard HTML. The signed URL grants access until it expires.

404.description: Dashboard link not found or expired

post.description: Read a bounded multimodal health context object for apps and agents.

post.summary: Compute longitudinal biomarker and wearable trends
post.description: Compute longitudinal biomarker and wearable trends (direction, delta, and status) across all uploads for a user.

get.description: Compute retest reminders (due, upcoming, or current) from the freshest data per modality against a cadence.
List a user's health goals with status.

metric.description: Marker or domain the goal targets, e.g. apob or body_fat_percent.

due_date.description: ISO date the user is aiming for.

post.description: Create a health goal (target metric, direction, value, and optional due date) for a user.

get.description: Read a single health goal.

post.description: Update a health goal (target, due date, status, or note).
Delete a health goal.
Query normalized observations and derived interpretations.

get.summary: Find providers across modalities (genetics, biomarkers/labs, wearables)

parameters.name: modality
parameters.description: Comma-separated modalities to search: genetics, biomarkers, wearables. Defaults to all.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Genetics filter: wgs, snp_array, or exome.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Genetics filter, e.g. Europe or North America.

parameters.name: postal_code
parameters.description: Lab locator: search draw sites near this postal code.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: Lab locator: search draw sites near this city.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Lab locator: country code for the search.

get.description: Find where to get wellness data across modalities in one call: pass modality=genetics,biomarkers,wearables to get WGS/genetic-testing providers, nearby lab draw sites (with a location), and supported wearable integrations. Results are grouped by modality.
Find Quest and SYNLAB patient service centers near a user-selected area. Returns real locations via partner APIs when available, with locator handoff fallback.

get.summary: List WGS and genetic testing providers
get.description: List whole genome sequencing (WGS), exome, and SNP array providers with pricing, turnaround, data formats, and regional availability.

get.summary: Get a specific genetic testing provider
get.description: Get details for a specific genetic testing provider by id.

post.description: Export tenant-scoped user data and return a portability receipt.
Tombstone tenant-scoped user data for deletion/export workflows.
Model Context Protocol (MCP) JSON-RPC endpoint: handles initialize, tools/list, and tools/call over the same capabilities as the REST API.

x402.name: PAYMENT-SIGNATURE
x402.description: x402 v2 payment payload. Request the route without credentials first to receive PAYMENT-REQUIRED options.

dashboard_url.description: Bearer URL for the exact dashboard snapshot. Keep it private unless the user chooses to share it.
